lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Padhay:
You have been blessed with this human body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਮਿਲਣ ਕੀ ਇਹ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gobind milan kee ih teree bareea |
lines.english: This is your chance to meet the Lord of the Universe.
Make the effort, and cross over the terrifying world ocean.
Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, vibrate and meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰਿ ਕਾਜ ਤੇਰੈ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: avar kaaj terai kitai na kaam |
lines.english: Other efforts are of no use to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਨ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam dharam na kamaaeaa |
lines.english: I have not practiced meditation, penance, self-restraint or righteous living;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਬ੍ਰਿਥਾ ਜਾਤ ਰੰਗਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam brithaa jaat rang maaeaa kai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This human life is passing away in vain, in the love of Maya. ||1||Pause||
Says Nanak, my actions are vile and despicable;
O Lord, I seek Your Sanctuary - please, preserve my honor. ||2||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਸਾਧ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa saadh na jaaniaa har raaeaa |
lines.english: I have not served the Holy Saints, and I do not know the Lord, my King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਸੰਗੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਕਾਹੇ ਜੀਅ ਡਰਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: toon saajan sangee prabh meraa kaahe jeea ddaraahee |1|
lines.english: You are my Friend and Companion, God; why should my soul be afraid? ||1||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਮੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: tujh bin avar naahee mai doojaa toon mere man maahee |
lines.english: Without You, there is no other for me; You alone are in my mind.
You are my support, You are my hope.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਠਤ ਊਠਤ ਸੋਵਤ ਜਾਗਤ ਵਿਸਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੂੰ ਸਾਸ ਗਿਰਾਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baitthat aootthat sovat jaagat visar naahee toon saas giraasaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: While sitting down or standing up, while sleeping or waking, with every breath and morsel of food, I never forget You. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਹਮ ਤੁਮਰੇ ਬਾਲ ਗੁਪਾਲਾ ॥੨॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: naanak ke sukhadaate satigur ham tumare baal gupaalaa |2|30|
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of peace to Nanak; I am Your child, O Lord of the World. ||2||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪਨੀ ਅਗਨਿ ਸਾਗਰ ਵਿਕਰਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: raakh raakh saran prabh apanee agan saagar vikaraalaa |
lines.english: Protect me, please protect me, O God; I have come to Your Sanctuary; the ocean of fire is so horrible.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
The Lord God has saved me, His slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਲਾ ਤਾਊ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paalaa taaoo kachhoo na biaapai raam naam gun gaae |
lines.english: Cold and heat do not touch me at all, when I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸਿਉ ਮੇਰੋ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਤਾਪੁ ਮੁਆ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: preetam siau mero man maaniaa taap muaa bikh khaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My mind has surrendered to my Beloved; my fever has taken poison and died. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਾਕੀ ਕੋ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸਰਨਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ddaakee ko chit kachhoo na laagai charan kamal saranaae |1|
lines.english: My consciousness is not affected by the witch, Maya; I take to the Sanctuary of the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਭਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ਹੋਏ ਆਪਿ ਸਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant prasaad bhe kirapaalaa hoe aap sahaae |
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, the Lord has shown His Mercy to me; He Himself is my Help and Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਨਿਤਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਹਸਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਮਿਟਾਇ ॥੨॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan nit gaavai naanak sahasaa dukh mittaae |2|31|
lines.english: Nanak ever sings the Praises of the Lord, the treasure of excellence; his doubts and pains are eliminated. ||2||31||
I have taken the medicine of the Name of the Lord.
I have found peace, and the seat of pain has been removed. ||1||
The fever has been broken, by the Teachings of the Perfect Guru.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਸਭਿ ਮਿਟੇ ਵਿਸੂਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anad bheaa sabh mitte visoore |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am in ecstasy, and all of my sorrows have been dispelled. ||1||Pause||
All beings and creatures obtain peace,
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
That time, which the mortal does not wish for, eventually comes.
O Nanak, meditating on the Supreme Lord God. ||2||32||
Without the Lord's Command, how can understanding be understood? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਨ ਬਾਲਾ ਬੂਢਾ ਭਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ohu na baalaa boodtaa bhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But the soul is neither young nor old, O Siblings of Destiny. ||1||Pause||
The body is consumed by water, fire and earth.
Forever and ever, the soul is illumined;
Servant Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Holy.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
By Guru's Grace, he has shaken off the fear of death. ||2||33||
in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, it dwells at the Feet of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਜਾਹਿ ਸਭੇ ਮਨ ਤੇਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: seetal saant sadaa sukh paaveh kilavikh jaeh sabhe man tere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall find lasting peace, contentment and tranquility, and all your sins shall depart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਤਿ ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam nit jap man mere |
lines.english: Chant the Lord's Name each and every day, O my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਰਮ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jaa ke pooran karam |
lines.english: Says Nanak, one who is blessed with perfect good karma,
meets the True Guru, and obtains the Perfect Supreme Lord God. ||2||34||
Thirty-four Shabads in Second House. ||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬੇਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa har suaamee prabh belee |
lines.english: She who has the Lord God as her Friend
